NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/7/21 IS CONTINUED TO 11/1/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND PREVAILING PARTY TO SERVE THE ORDER. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE PURSUANT TO PARTIES' STIPULATION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/1/21 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 4/11/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY SHALL SERVE THE ORDER. Continued to April 11, 2022 by the Court's own motion. Defendant City and County of San Francisco is ordered to re-notice the motion for summary judgment or in the alternative, summary adjucation pursuant to the parties' stipulation to continue the trial date, which states, "[t]he parties further stipulate that the City shall re-notice its summary judgment motion (which is currently set for hearing on March 28, 2022)."
